attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.WEEE_FEE_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.PRODUCT_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.APPLICATION_METHOD, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.OPERAND, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
  $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES,
 (
 select WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID,WEEE_FEE_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES
 minus
 select WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID,WEEE_FEE_LINE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID = STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.WEEE_FEE_HEADER_ID and ACM.WEEE_FEE_LINE_ID=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.WEEE_FEE_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXCFIR_WEEE_FEE_LINES)
